## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives for HeyGen's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is showing solid growth, with 80-100 clicks per day and heading towards 1000 clicks per month](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [22 new blog posts are ready to go live, focusing on e-learning and marketing topics](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Team is working on scaling up tool pages and creating content for 2024/2025 planning](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Issues with CMS publishing dates and meta descriptions need to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [10 blogs, 5 language pairs, and 5 tool pages published](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [80-100 clicks per day, 450 clicks last week](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Month-over-month growth heading towards 1000 clicks per month](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Publishing 3 articles per week: 1 marketing, 2 e-learning](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Need to generate more topics for ongoing e-learning campaign](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### Technical Issues and CMS Management

  - [Discrepancies in publishing dates on CMS need to be resolved](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Custom field for hard-coded publish date to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [Meta titles and descriptions not visible for some team members](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Team to investigate user permissions and roles in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Upcoming Content Initiatives

  - [Focus on 2024 wrap-up and 2025 planning content](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Create tangible resources like "2025 budgeting guide for marketers"](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Develop content on best generative AI marketing tools](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Explore creating downloadable templates or checklists](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Team to review and update agency backlink list](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Jimmy to share previous email template for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### API Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [Research needed for API focused on translating videos, creating videos, or interactive videos](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Separate messaging track to be developed for API offerings](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bisera to receive and implement topic categories for tool pages](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [SF Conference Sun Room to provide list of correct publish dates for backfilling](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Team to investigate and resolve CMS issues (publishing dates, meta descriptions)](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Create content templates for 2025 planning and budgeting guides](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Jimmy to add SF Conference Sun Room to account for backlink workflow access](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Team to conduct research on API go-to-market strategy and share findings in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [No meeting next week due to Thanksgiving; team to send Slack updates for urgent requests](https://fathom.video/share/hzhLoCHJtB977fD3mCh_QbxourX_Re7z?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
